_notes: Append one entry per Claude/Codex session running IN THIS REPO (factory) to sessions[].
Each session entry: { date, session_id, agent, model, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd, task_summary }.

Totals are recomputed manually or by the Claude Code session that writes a new entry — this file is factory-repo-only. IFleet has its own costs.json in the IFleet repo (see IFleet PR #39 for that tracker).
Cost ceiling check: sum of today's sessions > daily_rate_cap_default = pause work + Discord alert.
Note updated 2026-05-22: removed incorrect cross-repo reference — closes AUDIT-factory-95226593.
